text:
SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: LOW 
 MEDIUM 
 HIGH 
 Null/missing 

COMMENT: This field is the stratified CVD risk group derived from the BASELINE_SCORE. For the purposes of the 
Million Hearts® Cardiovascular Disease Risk Reduction Model, CMS defined “high-risk” beneficiaries as 
individuals with an ACC/AHA 10-year ASCVD risk score of greater than 30%. The ACC/AHA guidelines 
still hold true that all individuals should have a risk score less than 7.5%. CMS was attempting to
